sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel data documented for this title

special_mechanics.name: Energy Ball Physics
special_mechanics.description: Player controls a virtual glove that throws/punches energy balls around a 3D room. Balls bounce off walls with tile-destruction mechanics. Ball bounces off invisible back wall and can be kept in play indefinitely if glove position maintained.

physics_values.room_dimensions: variable tile surfaces (left/right walls: 20 tiles, top/bottom: 32 tiles, far wall: 40 tiles)

special_mechanics.name: Super Ball Power-up
special_mechanics.description: Temporary power-up that increases energy ball speed significantly and allows it to bounce off back wall while player handles other tasks

special_mechanics.name: Robo-Bullet Projectiles
special_mechanics.description: Index finger projectiles shot via Select button. One-hit tile destruction. Can attack enemies. Max ammo: 99 (starts with 40).

feel_descriptors: Power Glove-optimized but playable with standard controller
tier_notes: Tier 3 empirical data. Game is primarily a 3D maze/ball physics puzzle game rather than traditional platformer. No precise movement parameters documented in available sources. Core mechanics involve energy ball dynamics and maze navigation rather than player avatar physics.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Super Glove Ball article
